summary: CRITICAL ISSUES: (1) Fixture files `fixtures/artifacts.json` and `fixtures/policy.json` are missing—workflow will fail immediately on file-not-found. (2) Action reference `actions/checkout@v4` is unpinned; task explicitly requires full-length commit SHA with date comment. (3) Test harness `Run-ActTests.ps1` defined but never invoked—workflow doesn't execute the act test suite as required. MAJOR: No `Set-StrictMode` in PowerShell modules (standard best practice). MODERATE: Try-catch blocks are present but could fail silently on malformed dates. Code logic is sound (policy union via hashtable is clean), module structure is well-organized, but deliverable is non-functional as-shipped.
